title: 15 Net income or loss from business 2024
description: Complete question 15 for income you derive or losses you incur from any business.
keywords: Individual tax return instructions, tax return 2024, supplement, income, net income, loss, income from business, loss from business, net loss, non-commercial, 2024, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: Things you need to know

You will need to lodge a Business and professional items schedule 2024 before you can complete this question. You should lodge your tax return using myTax or a registered tax agent. If you are unable to use myTax or a registered tax agent, contact us and we will mail you a paper tax return and a Business and professional items schedule 2024 .
This question covers:

items: income from being a sole trader
income or a loss from a primary production business
income under a pay as you go (PAYG) voluntary agreement
income from which an amount was withheld because you did not quote your Australian business number (ABN)
income you derived as a foreign resident from which an amount was withheld because it was subject to foreign resident withholding
income of an independent contractor working under a labour hire arrangement

income from the following specified payments payment for tutorial services provided under the Indigenous Student Success Programme (formerly known as the Indigenous Tutorial Assistance Scheme) of the Department of the Prime Minister and Cabinet payment for translation and interpretation services provided for the Translating and Interpreting Service National of the Department of Home Affairs income as a performing artist in a promotional activity
any other business income
the small business income tax offset (see Part D ).

content_blocks.text: A specified payment is a payment specified in tax law for PAYG withholding purposes.
Did you derive income or incur a loss from any business in 2023–24?

items: No – Go to question 16 Deferred non-commercial business losses 2024 .

Yes – You should lodge your tax return using myTax or a registered tax agent. If you are unable to use myTax or a registered tax agent, contact us and we will mail you a paper tax return and a Business and professional items schedule 2024 .

content_blocks.text: Don't include at this question
Don't show at this question:

items: Personal services income (PSI) included at question 14 Personal services income 2024 .
Foreign source business income included at question 20 Foreign source income and foreign assets or property 2024 .
credit for amounts withheld from business as a result of the foreign resident capital gains withholding rules. Show the amounts of credit at question 18 Capital gains 2024 .

content_blocks.text: What you need to answer this question
You will need to lodge a Business and professional items schedule 2024 , see Business and professional items schedule instructions 2024 .
You must show your net income or loss (that is, gross business income less business deductions) at question 15 :

items: label B for primary production
label C for non-primary production.

content_blocks.text: You carry on a primary production business if you carry on a business undertaking:

items: plant or animal cultivation (or both)
fishing or pearling (or both)
tree farming or felling (or both).

content_blocks.text: These publications may help you to correctly complete question 15:

items: Taxation Ruling TR 92/18 Income tax: bad debts
Taxation Ruling TR 93/30 Income tax: deductions for home office expenses
Taxation Ruling TR 96/7 Income tax: record keeping – section 262A – general principles
Taxation Ruling TR 96/11 Income tax: record keeping – taxi industry – guidelines for recording taxi takings
Taxation Ruling TR 97/11 Income tax: am I carrying on a business of primary production?
Taxation Ruling TR 97/23 Income tax: deductions for repairs
Taxation Ruling TR 2018/2 Income tax: record keeping and access – electronic records
Information for primary producers 2024
Guide to depreciating assets 2024
Small business CGT concessions .

content_blocks.text: Completing your supplementary tax return
If lodging by paper, you can't enter amounts in the supplementary tax return for this question. You should lodge your tax return using myTax or a registered tax agent.
If you are unable to use myTax or a registered tax agent, contact us and we will mail you a paper:

items: tax return with fields for questions 14 , 15 and 16
Business and professional items schedule 2024 .

content_blocks.text: To complete this question, answer the following parts and steps.
Part A
To complete this question, you need to read and complete the Business and professional items schedule 2024 and Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024. Follow the steps below.
Step 1
Complete the Business and professional items schedule, see Business and professional items schedule instructions 2024 .
Step 2
If you received business income from which tax was withheld, complete the Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 .
Part B
Did you derive income or incur a loss from a primary production business?

items: No – Go to Part C .
Yes – Follow the steps below.

content_blocks.text: Step 1

Transfer your net income or loss from a primary production business shown at P8 Business income and expenses – label Y in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 to question 15 – label B in your supplementary tax return. Don't show cents.
Step 2
If you made a loss, print L in the LOSS box at question 15 – label B .
Step 3

If you made a loss from one or more business activities, check that you have completed P3 Number of business activities and P9 Business loss activity details in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 .
Part C
Did you derive income or incur a loss from any non-primary production business?

items: No – Go to Part D .
Yes – Follow the steps below.

content_blocks.text: Step 1

Transfer your net income or loss from a non-primary production business shown at P8 Business income and expenses – label Z in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 to question 15 – label C in your supplementary tax return. Don't show cents.
Step 2
If you made a loss, print L in the LOSS box at question 15 – label C .
Step 3

If you made a loss from one or more business activities, check that you have completed P3 Number of business activities and P9 Business loss activity details in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 .

If you carried on a business as an author of a literary, dramatic, musical or artistic work or as an inventor, performing artist, production associate or active sportsperson, you must also write the amount of income from these business activities at question 24 Other income 2024 – label Z . You will not be taxed twice on this income.
Part D
Are you a small business entity?

items: No – Go to Part E .
Yes – Follow the steps below.

content_blocks.text: You may be entitled to the small business income tax offset of up to $1,000. We will use the information you provide here to work out the amount of your tax offset. The amount you show at this question is not included in your income.

To answer Part D, you need to work out your net small business income, which is your assessable income from carrying on your business less your deductions to the extent that they are attributable to that assessable income.
Don't show at Part D :

items: PSI included at question 14 Personal services income 2024
salary, wages or director's fees
dividend income of directors
dividend and interest income, unless it is derived from carrying on the business activity and you have shown an amount at question 15 Net income or loss from business 2024
partnership share of net small business income less deductions attributable to that share shown at question 13 – label D
trust share of net small business income less deductions attributable to that share shown at question 13 – label E .

content_blocks.text: If you have net small business income from P8 Business income and expenses in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 you completed, go to Step 1.

If your only income or loss from carrying on a business as a small business entity is at question 20 – label M . Use our Small business income tax offset calculator to work out your net small business income.
Step 1

If you have net small business income from P8 Business income and expenses in the Business and professional items schedule 2024, show it at question 15 Net small business income – label A in your supplementary tax return then go to Part E .
Step 2

If your only income or loss from carrying on a business as a small business entity is at question 20 – label M , show the result of the Small business income tax offset calculator at question 15 Net small business income – label A in your supplementary tax return.
Part E

In your calculation of total business income in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 , did you include income from which an amount of tax was withheld at Income in P8 Business income and expenses – labels B , C , D , E , F , N or O ?

items: No – Go to Checks before moving to the next question .
Yes – Follow the steps below.

content_blocks.text: Step 1
Did you have any amounts of tax withheld under a pay as you go (PAYG) voluntary agreement?

items: No – Go to Step 2 .
Yes – Read on.

content_blocks.text: Add up all the amounts on your Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 shown in the Tax withheld boxes where you have printed V in the Type box.

These amounts must correspond with the Gross payments shown at P8 Business income and expenses – labels E and F in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 . Show this total at question 15 Net small business income – label D in your supplementary tax return. Don't show cents.
Step 2
Did you have any amounts of tax withheld because you did not quote your ABN?

items: No – Go to Step 3 .
Yes – Read on.

content_blocks.text: Add up all the amounts on your Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 shown in the Tax withheld boxes where you have printed N in the Type box.

These amounts must correspond with the Gross payments shown at P8 Business income and expenses – labels C and D in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 . Show this total at question 15 Net small business income – label W in your supplementary tax return. Show cents.
Step 3
Were you a foreign resident and had any amounts of tax withheld because your income was subject to foreign resident withholding?

items: No – Go to Step 4 .
Yes – Read on.

content_blocks.text: Add up all the amounts on your Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 shown in the Tax withheld boxes where you have printed F in the Type box.

These amounts must correspond with the Gross payments shown at P8 Business income and expenses – label B in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 . Show this amount at question 15 Net small business income – label E in your supplementary tax return. Show cents.
Don't include credits for amounts withheld as a result of the foreign resident capital gains withholding rules at question 15 Net small business income – label E .
Step 4
Did you have any amounts of tax withheld because you received income:

items: working under a labour hire arrangement, or
from a specified payment?

content_blocks.text: If you answered:

items: No – Go to Checks before moving to the next question .
Yes – Read on.

content_blocks.text: Add up all the amounts on your Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 shown in the Tax withheld boxes where you have printed S in the Type box.

These amounts must correspond with the Gross payments shown at P8 Business income and expenses – labels N and O in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 . Show this amount at question 15 Net small business income – label F in your supplementary tax return. Don't show cents.
Checks before moving to the next question
Check that you have:

items: read Business and professional items schedule instructions 2024
completed the Business and professional items schedule 2024

transferred the amounts from P8 Business income and expenses – labels Y and Z in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 to question 15 Net small business income – labels B and C respectively in your supplementary tax return (if these amounts are losses check that you have printed L in the Loss boxes at labels B and C )
completed question 15 – label A if you are a small business entity.

content_blocks.text: If you received business income from which tax was withheld, check that you have:

items: completed the Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 and attached it to your tax return
written amounts at question 15 – labels D , W , E and F , if required
not included the foreign resident capital gains withholding credit at question 15 – label E .

content_blocks.text: Where to go next

items: Go to question 16 Deferred non-commercial business losses 2024 .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .
Go back to question 14 Personal services income 2024 .

content_text:
## Things you need to know
You will need to lodge a Business and professional items schedule 2024 before you can complete this question. You should lodge your tax return using myTax or a registered tax agent. If you are unable to use myTax or a registered tax agent, contact us and we will mail you a paper tax return and a Business and professional items schedule 2024 .
This question covers:
- income from being a sole trader
- income or a loss from a primary production business
- income under a pay as you go (PAYG) voluntary agreement
- income from which an amount was withheld because you did not quote your Australian business number (ABN)
- income you derived as a foreign resident from which an amount was withheld because it was subject to foreign resident withholding
- income of an independent contractor working under a labour hire arrangement
- income from the following specified payments payment for tutorial services provided under the Indigenous Student Success Programme (formerly known as the Indigenous Tutorial Assistance Scheme) of the Department of the Prime Minister and Cabinet payment for translation and interpretation services provided for the Translating and Interpreting Service National of the Department of Home Affairs income as a performing artist in a promotional activity
- any other business income
- the small business income tax offset (see Part D ).
A specified payment is a payment specified in tax law for PAYG withholding purposes.
Did you derive income or incur a loss from any business in 2023–24?
- No – Go to question 16 Deferred non-commercial business losses 2024 .
- Yes – You should lodge your tax return using myTax or a registered tax agent. If you are unable to use myTax or a registered tax agent, contact us and we will mail you a paper tax return and a Business and professional items schedule 2024 .
### Don't include at this question
Don't show at this question:
- Personal services income (PSI) included at question 14 Personal services income 2024 .
- Foreign source business income included at question 20 Foreign source income and foreign assets or property 2024 .
- credit for amounts withheld from business as a result of the foreign resident capital gains withholding rules. Show the amounts of credit at question 18 Capital gains 2024 .
## What you need to answer this question
You will need to lodge a Business and professional items schedule 2024 , see Business and professional items schedule instructions 2024 .
You must show your net income or loss (that is, gross business income less business deductions) at question 15 :
- label B for primary production
- label C for non-primary production.
You carry on a primary production business if you carry on a business undertaking:
- plant or animal cultivation (or both)
- fishing or pearling (or both)
- tree farming or felling (or both).
These publications may help you to correctly complete question 15:
- Taxation Ruling TR 92/18 Income tax: bad debts
- Taxation Ruling TR 93/30 Income tax: deductions for home office expenses
- Taxation Ruling TR 96/7 Income tax: record keeping – section 262A – general principles
- Taxation Ruling TR 96/11 Income tax: record keeping – taxi industry – guidelines for recording taxi takings
- Taxation Ruling TR 97/11 Income tax: am I carrying on a business of primary production?
- Taxation Ruling TR 97/23 Income tax: deductions for repairs
- Taxation Ruling TR 2018/2 Income tax: record keeping and access – electronic records
- Information for primary producers 2024
- Guide to depreciating assets 2024
- Small business CGT concessions .
## Completing your supplementary tax return
If lodging by paper, you can't enter amounts in the supplementary tax return for this question. You should lodge your tax return using myTax or a registered tax agent.
If you are unable to use myTax or a registered tax agent, contact us and we will mail you a paper:
- tax return with fields for questions 14 , 15 and 16
- Business and professional items schedule 2024 .
To complete this question, answer the following parts and steps.
### Part A
To complete this question, you need to read and complete the Business and professional items schedule 2024 and Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024. Follow the steps below.
#### Step 1
Complete the Business and professional items schedule, see Business and professional items schedule instructions 2024 .
#### Step 2
If you received business income from which tax was withheld, complete the Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 .
### Part B
Did you derive income or incur a loss from a primary production business?
- No – Go to Part C .
- Yes – Follow the steps below.
#### Step 1
Transfer your net income or loss from a primary production business shown at P8 Business income and expenses – label Y in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 to question 15 – label B in your supplementary tax return. Don't show cents.
#### Step 2
If you made a loss, print L in the LOSS box at question 15 – label B .
#### Step 3
If you made a loss from one or more business activities, check that you have completed P3 Number of business activities and P9 Business loss activity details in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 .
### Part C
Did you derive income or incur a loss from any non-primary production business?
- No – Go to Part D .
- Yes – Follow the steps below.
#### Step 1
Transfer your net income or loss from a non-primary production business shown at P8 Business income and expenses – label Z in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 to question 15 – label C in your supplementary tax return. Don't show cents.
#### Step 2
If you made a loss, print L in the LOSS box at question 15 – label C .
#### Step 3
If you made a loss from one or more business activities, check that you have completed P3 Number of business activities and P9 Business loss activity details in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 .
If you carried on a business as an author of a literary, dramatic, musical or artistic work or as an inventor, performing artist, production associate or active sportsperson, you must also write the amount of income from these business activities at question 24 Other income 2024 – label Z . You will not be taxed twice on this income.
### Part D
Are you a small business entity?
- No – Go to Part E .
- Yes – Follow the steps below.
You may be entitled to the small business income tax offset of up to $1,000. We will use the information you provide here to work out the amount of your tax offset. The amount you show at this question is not included in your income.
To answer Part D, you need to work out your net small business income, which is your assessable income from carrying on your business less your deductions to the extent that they are attributable to that assessable income.
Don't show at Part D :
- PSI included at question 14 Personal services income 2024
- salary, wages or director's fees
- dividend income of directors
- dividend and interest income, unless it is derived from carrying on the business activity and you have shown an amount at question 15 Net income or loss from business 2024
- partnership share of net small business income less deductions attributable to that share shown at question 13 – label D
- trust share of net small business income less deductions attributable to that share shown at question 13 – label E .
If you have net small business income from P8 Business income and expenses in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 you completed, go to Step 1.
If your only income or loss from carrying on a business as a small business entity is at question 20 – label M . Use our Small business income tax offset calculator to work out your net small business income.
#### Step 1
If you have net small business income from P8 Business income and expenses in the Business and professional items schedule 2024, show it at question 15 Net small business income – label A in your supplementary tax return then go to Part E .
#### Step 2
If your only income or loss from carrying on a business as a small business entity is at question 20 – label M , show the result of the Small business income tax offset calculator at question 15 Net small business income – label A in your supplementary tax return.
### Part E
In your calculation of total business income in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 , did you include income from which an amount of tax was withheld at Income in P8 Business income and expenses – labels B , C , D , E , F , N or O ?
- No – Go to Checks before moving to the next question .
- Yes – Follow the steps below.
#### Step 1
Did you have any amounts of tax withheld under a pay as you go (PAYG) voluntary agreement?
- No – Go to Step 2 .
- Yes – Read on.
Add up all the amounts on your Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 shown in the Tax withheld boxes where you have printed V in the Type box.
These amounts must correspond with the Gross payments shown at P8 Business income and expenses – labels E and F in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 . Show this total at question 15 Net small business income – label D in your supplementary tax return. Don't show cents.
#### Step 2
Did you have any amounts of tax withheld because you did not quote your ABN?
- No – Go to Step 3 .
- Yes – Read on.
Add up all the amounts on your Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 shown in the Tax withheld boxes where you have printed N in the Type box.
These amounts must correspond with the Gross payments shown at P8 Business income and expenses – labels C and D in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 . Show this total at question 15 Net small business income – label W in your supplementary tax return. Show cents.
#### Step 3
Were you a foreign resident and had any amounts of tax withheld because your income was subject to foreign resident withholding?
- No – Go to Step 4 .
- Yes – Read on.
Add up all the amounts on your Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 shown in the Tax withheld boxes where you have printed F in the Type box.
These amounts must correspond with the Gross payments shown at P8 Business income and expenses – label B in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 . Show this amount at question 15 Net small business income – label E in your supplementary tax return. Show cents.
Don't include credits for amounts withheld as a result of the foreign resident capital gains withholding rules at question 15 Net small business income – label E .
#### Step 4
Did you have any amounts of tax withheld because you received income:
- working under a labour hire arrangement, or
- from a specified payment?
If you answered:
- No – Go to Checks before moving to the next question .
- Yes – Read on.
Add up all the amounts on your Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 shown in the Tax withheld boxes where you have printed S in the Type box.
These amounts must correspond with the Gross payments shown at P8 Business income and expenses – labels N and O in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 . Show this amount at question 15 Net small business income – label F in your supplementary tax return. Don't show cents.
### Checks before moving to the next question
Check that you have:
- read Business and professional items schedule instructions 2024
- completed the Business and professional items schedule 2024
- transferred the amounts from P8 Business income and expenses – labels Y and Z in the Business and professional items schedule 2024 to question 15 Net small business income – labels B and C respectively in your supplementary tax return (if these amounts are losses check that you have printed L in the Loss boxes at labels B and C )
- completed question 15 – label A if you are a small business entity.
If you received business income from which tax was withheld, check that you have:
- completed the Individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2024 and attached it to your tax return
- written amounts at question 15 – labels D , W , E and F , if required
- not included the foreign resident capital gains withholding credit at question 15 – label E .
## Where to go next
- Go to question 16 Deferred non-commercial business losses 2024 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .
- Go back to question 14 Personal services income 2024 .
